item.description: Jeff Pack signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington Citizens Against Unfair Taxes.

item.description: Tim Eyman signed up to testify Con.

item.description: Steven Drew signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Thurston County Assessor and Leg Chair for the Wa Assoc of Assessors.

item.title: 👍💵Jennifer Wallace - WA Association of County Officials
item.description: Jennifer Wallace signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA Association of County Officials. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Michael McKinley - WA Association of County Officials
item.description: Michael McKinley signed up to testify Pro.
